# Obligatory AI Generated Comment Compliance

Use this skill whenever you create new files or new classes.

## Mandatory rule

Add the exact text:

`generated by AI in Github cloud`

## Required placement

1. Near the top of every newly created file.
2. In or directly above each newly created class definition.

## Validation checklist

- Text is exact (no punctuation/case changes).
- Added to all new files in the change.
- Added for every new class in the change.
